translation.literal_translation: If (you object) because smallness is heard, that has already been answered. (21)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.21: the alpa-shruti objection against Brahman in dahara-vidya is previously resolved.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra shorthand for inherited alpatva rebuttal.
